name: vibe-check
description: A linter-grade production-readiness audit for vibe-coded (AI-generated) apps. The audit skill profiles your app (with a bundled static scanner), checks only what applies, grades with stable rule IDs and cited evidence, computes a readiness score, and outputs a gap table plus detailed finding cards with exact fixes — routing to 17 focused skills for security, secrets, auth, scaling, data, database selection, AI reliability, LLM cost, observability, deployment, reliability, compliance, API design, frontend quality, infra cost, and monetization.
